context: Tests whether the agent follows the 3-step staged upload pattern (stagedUploadsCreate → POST binary → fileCreate), polls until fileStatus == READY, uses the correct SKU convention, and sets templateSuffix to match the template filename.

checklist.name: Upload script file created
checklist.description: scripts/upload_teabox_images.py (or equivalent upload script name) exists as a non-empty Python file

checklist.name: stagedUploadsCreate step present
checklist.description: Upload script or documentation references 'stagedUploadsCreate' as the first step — creating the staged upload targets before sending any files

checklist.name: Binary POST to GCS URL
checklist.description: Upload script or documentation references POSTing the binary file to the returned GCS/target URL as multipart/form-data (step 2 of the staged upload)

checklist.name: fileCreate step present
checklist.description: Upload script or documentation references 'fileCreate' mutation with originalSource and contentType: IMAGE as the third step to register the file in Shopify

checklist.name: Poll until fileStatus READY
checklist.description: Script or documentation mentions querying/polling the file by ID until fileStatus equals READY before using the CDN URL

checklist.name: SKU convention followed
checklist.description: product_creation_commands.md shows SKUs following the <BRAND>-<HANDLE>-<VARIANT> convention (e.g., HPK-TRAIL-MO, HPK-SUMM-MO, HPK-EXPED-MO or similar using the brand abbreviation HPK)

checklist.name: Template file created
checklist.description: templates/product.subscription.json exists and contains valid JSON with at least one Shopify section reference

checklist.name: templateSuffix matches filename
checklist.description: Documentation shows setting templateSuffix to 'subscription' to match the templates/product.subscription.json filename (not 'product.subscription' or any other value)

checklist.name: productUpdate mutation shown
checklist.description: Documentation shows a productUpdate GraphQL mutation or equivalent for applying the templateSuffix to an existing product

checklist.name: uv script header in upload script
checklist.description: Upload script includes the uv/PEP 723 script header (# /// script, requires-python, dependencies) at the top
